customers.CustomerID: Unique identifier for each customer, facilitating data management and retrieval.
customers.Segment: Categorizes customers into distinct groups for targeted marketing strategies.
customers.Currency: Denotes the currency used for transactions, ensuring accurate financial reporting.

gasstations.GasStationID: Unique identifier for each gas station in the database.
gasstations.ChainID: Identifier representing the gas station's parent company or chain.
gasstations.Country: Three-letter code indicating the country where the gas station is located.
gasstations.Segment: Classification of the gas station based on pricing and service quality.

products.ProductID: Unique identifier for each product, ensuring distinct entries in the database.
products.Description: Detailed information about the product, providing context and usage for customers.

transactions_1k.TransactionID: Unique identifier for each transaction, ensuring distinct record tracking.
transactions_1k.Date: The date when the transaction occurred, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
transactions_1k.Time: The specific time of day the transaction took place, in HH:MM:SS format.
transactions_1k.CustomerID: Unique identifier for each customer, allowing for personalized transaction tracking.
transactions_1k.CardID: Unique identifier for the payment card used in the transaction.
transactions_1k.GasStationID: Unique identifier for the gas station where the transaction occurred.
transactions_1k.ProductID: Unique identifier for the product purchased during the transaction.
transactions_1k.Amount: The quantity of the product purchased in the transaction.
transactions_1k.Price: The total price of the transaction, reflecting the cost of purchased items.

yearmonth.CustomerID: Unique identifier for each customer, facilitating personalized data tracking and analysis.
yearmonth.Date: Represents the year and month of data in a six-character numeric format.
yearmonth.Consumption: Measures the amount consumed, reflecting customer usage patterns and trends over time.
